evals.prompt: Write a follow-up email to a client after we missed a deadline on the Q3 report, explaining the delay and giving them a new date of next Friday.
evals.expected_output: A short, direct client email that owns the delay, gives a concrete new date, and doesn't lean on stock apology boilerplate, hedging, or a wall of uniform-length sentences.

assertions.name: no_banned_vocabulary
assertions.description: Output contains zero hits from the banned AI-vocabulary list (delve, robust, leverage, showcase, meticulous, etc.)

assertions.name: no_boilerplate_phrases
assertions.description: Output contains zero stock AI phrases ("it's important to note", "in today's fast-paced world", etc.)

assertions.name: em_dash_not_excessive
assertions.description: Em dash usage stays at or below 3 per 100 words

assertions.name: sentence_length_varies
assertions.description: Sentence lengths show natural variation rather than uniform robotic rhythm

evals.prompt: Write a short LinkedIn post announcing that our team just shipped a CSV export feature for our analytics dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A short social post that announces the feature with some specificity/personality rather than generic hype vocabulary (leverage, robust, game-changing) or a mechanical rule-of-three structure.

assertions.name: no_banned_vocabulary
assertions.description: Output contains zero hits from the banned AI-vocabulary list

assertions.name: no_boilerplate_phrases
assertions.description: Output contains zero stock AI phrases

assertions.name: em_dash_not_excessive
assertions.description: Em dash usage stays at or below 3 per 100 words

assertions.name: sentence_length_varies
assertions.description: Sentence lengths show natural variation rather than uniform robotic rhythm

evals.prompt: Write the opening paragraph (150-200 words) of a blog post arguing that remote teams should replace daily standups with async written updates.
evals.expected_output: An opening paragraph that makes a real argument with varied sentence rhythm, not a 'in today's fast-paced world' hook or a formulaic three-part structure.

assertions.name: no_banned_vocabulary
assertions.description: Output contains zero hits from the banned AI-vocabulary list

assertions.name: no_boilerplate_phrases
assertions.description: Output contains zero stock AI phrases

assertions.name: em_dash_not_excessive
assertions.description: Em dash usage stays at or below 3 per 100 words

assertions.name: sentence_length_varies
assertions.description: Sentence lengths show natural variation rather than uniform robotic rhythm
